title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies:
Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies!
